title: Don't Turn 'em Loose
writer: Harry Segall, Thomas Walsh, Ferdinand Reyher
actors: Lewis Stone, James Gleason, Bruce Cabot
plot: A conscientious attorney who is a member of the State Parole Board, finds his own son, using an alias, up for parole and makes the decision to cast the approving vote. This turns out to cause many problems for the family while on ...
